basics.name: Dashrath Mundkar
basics.title: Lead DevOps / Site Reliability Engineer
basics.summary:
I'm a DevOps Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing, automating, and scaling cloud-native infrastructure using Azure, Kubernetes, and modern DevOps tooling. I specialize in building high-availability platforms, optimizing CI/CD pipelines, and enabling engineering teams to ship software faster, safer, and with full observability.

Over the years, I've worked across the full DevOps lifecycle — from infrastructure automation to deployment strategies, monitoring, and security — with a strong focus on reliability and performance. I'm passionate about experimenting with cutting-edge solutions, sharing knowledge on Stack Overflow, and contributing to the open-source community!

bullets: Led the design, provisioning, and management of cloud infrastructure on Azure using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), ensuring scalability, security, and high availability and onboarded project on the azure environment.
Planned and delivered application and database migration strategies, ensuring minimal downtime and business continuity.

Designed, implemented, and maintained enterprise-grade CI/CD platforms using Jenkins, GitHub, ArgoCD, Helm, Docker, SonarQube, Artifactory, and Groovy, enabling fully automated build and deployment pipelines.
Developed and maintained custom Docker images and automation scripts (Bash, Maven, Jenkins) to streamline build, deployment, and maintenance processes.
Implemented monitoring and observability solutions using Datadog, Prometheus, and Grafana, improving system reliability and proactive incident management.
Introduced DevSecOps tools such as Kyverno and Snyk tools for security improvements.
Defined and implemented Service Level Objectives (SLOs) aligned with Service Level Agreements (SLAs) to ensure platform performance and reliability.
Led continuous improvement initiatives to reduce technical debt, strengthen DevOps maturity, and maximize automation across CI/CD and infrastructure.
Guided and mentored cross-functional teams across multiple projects, promoting DevOps best practices and cloud-native adoption.
Improved cost optimisation of infrastructure by choosing right fit model by considering the requirements.
Acted as a DevOps coach and technical advisor to clients, aligning cloud and DevOps solutions with business and enterprise requirements.
Enabled 250+ developers across multiple teams through robust CI/CD infrastructure, ensuring seamless development and issue-free software delivery.
Designed and supported CI/CD pipelines using AWS, Jenkins, GitLab, ArgoCD, Helm, Docker, Kubernetes/OpenShift, RHEL, SonarQube, Artifactory, Groovy.
Built containerized applications and custom Docker images; automated build and deployment using Jenkins, Maven, Bash.
Installed, configured, and maintained CI/CD, automation, and configuration management tools.
Automated infrastructure and deployments using Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenShift.
Implemented monitoring and observability with Prometheus and Grafana.
Improved CI/CD automation, scalability, and deployment reliability.
Led application and CI/CD infrastructure migration from on-premises to AWS cloud.
Provided DevOps coaching and best-practice guidance to teams and clients.
Developer for Sivantos Corporate Directory
Maintaining the Application and Fixing Bugs
Handling tools for Automated Jobs like Visual Cron, etc.
Maintaining Database of Sivantos Employees using tools like MySQL
